summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements: REQ-5 (ReflectionPhase extraction) is fully implemented, REQ-4 (combined container) is mentioned in the file summary, and REQ-1 (MindfulnessGuide moved to bottom) is mentioned in the file summary. However, the MindfulnessGuide.tsx diff is truncated and does not provide visible evidence for REQ-2 (centered dynamic title) or REQ-3 (More Details button at bottom center). The PreMeditationPage.tsx diff is also truncated, making it impossible to fully verify REQ-1 and REQ-4 layout details from code. REQ-5 is well-evidenced in the new ReflectionPhase.tsx file, though prop names differ slightly from the spec.

missing_requirements.requirement: Center the MindfulnessGuide title at the top of its container; title reads '[MeditationType] Meditation Guide' dynamically.
missing_requirements.reason: The MindfulnessGuide.tsx diff is truncated and shows no evidence of a centered dynamic title reading '[MeditationType] Meditation Guide' at the top of the container.

missing_requirements.requirement: Move the 'More Details' button to the bottom center of the MindfulnessGuide container.
missing_requirements.reason: The MindfulnessGuide.tsx diff is truncated and contains no visible evidence of the 'More Details' button being repositioned to the bottom center.

hallucinated_features.description: ReflectionPhase component uses different prop names than specified (onMoodToggle, onEnergySelect, onReflectionChange, onFavoriteChange, onSave, isSaving instead of handleMoodToggle, setSelectedEnergy, setReflection, setIsFavorite, handleSaveReflection, recordSession.isPending/createJournalEntry.isPending).
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies exact prop names for the ReflectionPhase component. The implemented component uses a different naming convention that was not requested.
